case_title: SHEILA YASDI VS. MATTHEWS LAW GROUP. P.C
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER YAZDI, SHEILA

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER SHEILA YAZDI'S MOTION TO CONFIRM AWARD OF ARBITRATOR IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MS. YAZDI IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN HER FAVOR IN THE AMOUNT OF $32,589.83, CALCULATED AS THE AMOUNT OF THE ARBITRATION AWARD ($29,683.30) PLUS PREJUDGMENT INTEREST THROUGH DECEMBER 10, 2018 AT 10 PERCENT PER ANNUM ($2,366.53) PLUS COSTS AS APPEARS ON THE COURT'S DOCKET ($540). ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK, NOT REPORTED (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Award Of Arbitrator
Off Calendar Dec-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sheila Yazdi, Plaintiff appearing in Pro Per, 415-548-3014;
No other appearance.

Ruling - The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner Sheila Yazdi's motion to confirm award of arbitrator is granted. No opposition filed. Ms. Yazdi is entitled to judgment in her favor in the amount of $32,589.83, calculated as the amount of the arbitration award ($29,683.30) plus prejudgment interest through December 10, 2018 at 10 percent per annum ($2,366.53) plus costs as appears on the court's docket ($540). Order and Judgment signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: William Trupek, Not Reported (302/HEK)
